en: "You shall not spread a false report. You shall not join hands with a wicked man to be a malicious witness.
zh: “不可傳播謠言，也不可與惡人攜手作假見證。

en: You shall not fall in with the many to do evil, nor shall you bear witness in a lawsuit, siding with the many, so as to pervert justice,
zh: 不可隨眾行惡，不可在訴訟的事上隨眾說歪曲正義的話；

en: nor shall you be partial to a poor man in his lawsuit.
zh: 也不可在訴訟的事上偏護窮人。

en: "If you meet your enemy's ox or his donkey going astray, you shall bring it back to him.
zh: “如果你遇見你仇敵的牛或是驢走迷了路，就應該把牠牽回來給他。

en: If you see the donkey of one who hates you lying down under its burden, you shall refrain from leaving him with it; you shall rescue it with him.
zh: 如果你看見恨你的人的驢伏在重擔之下，不可走開不理牠，你應該與驢主一同卸下重擔。

en: "You shall not pervert the justice due to your poor in his lawsuit.
zh: 不可在窮人訴訟的事上歪曲正義。

en: Keep far from a false charge, and do not kill the innocent and righteous, for I will not acquit the wicked.
zh: 要遠離虛假的事；不可殺無辜和正義的人，因為我決不以惡人為義人。

en: And you shall take no bribe, for a bribe blinds the clear-sighted and subverts the cause of those who are in the right.
zh: 不可受賄賂，因為賄賂能使明眼人變瞎，又能歪曲義人的話。

en: "You shall not oppress a sojourner. You know the heart of a sojourner, for you were sojourners in the land of Egypt.
zh: 不可壓迫寄居的，因為你們在埃及地也作過寄居的，知道寄居者的心情。

en: "For six years you shall sow your land and gather in its yield,
zh: “六年之內你要耕種田地，收取地的出產；

en: but the seventh year you shall let it rest and lie fallow, that the poor of your people may eat; and what they leave the beasts of the field may eat. You shall do likewise with your vineyard, and with your olive orchard.
zh: 但是第七年，你要讓地歇息，不耕不種，使你民間的窮人可以有吃的；他們吃剩的，田間的野獸可以吃；你的葡萄園和橄欖園，也要這樣作。

en: "Six days you shall do your work, but on the seventh day you shall rest; that your ox and your donkey may have rest, and the son of your servant woman, and the alien, may be refreshed.
zh: 六日之內，你要作你的工；但第七日你要安息，好使你的牛和驢可以歇息，並且使你婢女的兒子和寄居的也可以有時間喘息一下。

en: "Pay attention to all that I have said to you, and make no mention of the names of other gods, nor let it be heard on your lips.
zh: 我對你們所說的一切，你們都要小心謹守，你們不可提別神的名，也不可讓人從你的口中聽到。

en: "Three times in the year you shall keep a feast to me.
zh: “每年三次，你要為我守節。

en: You shall keep the Feast of Unleavened Bread. As I commanded you, you shall eat unleavened bread for seven days at the appointed time in the month of Abib, for in it you came out of Egypt. None shall appear before me empty-handed.
zh: 你要守無酵節，要照我吩咐的，在亞筆月內所定的日期，吃無酵餅七天，因為你是在這個月從埃及出來的。你們不可空手朝見我。

en: You shall keep the Feast of Harvest, of the firstfruits of your labor, of what you sow in the field. You shall keep the Feast of Ingathering at the end of the year, when you gather in from the field the fruit of your labor.
zh: 又要守收割節，就是收在田間你勞碌耕種所得初熟之物的節；也要在年底守收藏節，就是在田間收集你勞碌所得之物的時候。

en: Three times in the year shall all your males appear before the Lord GOD.
zh: 一年三次，你所有的男丁都要朝見主耶和華的面。

en: "You shall not offer the blood of my sacrifice with anything leavened, or let the fat of my feast remain until the morning.
zh: “你不可把我祭牲的血和有酵的餅一同獻上；也不可把我節日祭牲的脂油留過夜到早晨。

en: "The best of the firstfruits of your ground you shall bring into the house of the LORD your God. "You shall not boil a young goat in its mother's milk.
zh: 要把你地上最上好的初熟之物帶到耶和華你 神的殿中。不可用山羊羔母的奶去煮山羊羔。

en: "Behold, I send an angel before you to guard you on the way and to bring you to the place that I have prepared.
zh: “看哪，我在你面前差派使者，好在路上保護你，領你到我預備的地方去。

en: Pay careful attention to him and obey his voice; do not rebel against him, for he will not pardon your transgression, for my name is in him.
zh: 你們在他面前要謹慎，要聽他的話，不可違背他；不然，他必不赦免你們的過犯，因為他是奉我的名來的。

en: "But if you carefully obey his voice and do all that I say, then I will be an enemy to your enemies and an adversary to your adversaries.
zh: 如果你實在聽他的話，遵行我吩咐的一切，我就要作你仇敵的仇敵，作你敵人的敵人。

en: "When my angel goes before you and brings you to the Amorites and the Hittites and the Perizzites and the Canaanites, the Hivites and the Jebusites, and I blot them out,
zh: 我的使者必在你前面走，領你到亞摩利人、赫人、比利洗人、迦南人、希未人、耶布斯人那裡去；我要把他們除掉。

en: you shall not bow down to their gods nor serve them, nor do as they do, but you shall utterly overthrow them and break their pillars in pieces.
zh: 你不可跪拜他們的神像，也不可事奉它們，不可作他們所作的，不可模仿他們的行為，卻要把神像完全拆毀，打碎他們的柱像。

en: You shall serve the LORD your God, and he will bless your bread and your water, and I will take sickness away from among you.
zh: 你們要事奉耶和華你們的 神，他就必賜福你的糧和你的水，我也必從你們中間除去疾病。

en: None shall miscarry or be barren in your land; I will fulfill the number of your days.
zh: 在你的境內，必沒有流產和不育的婦女；我必使你一生的壽數滿足。

en: I will send my terror before you and will throw into confusion all the people against whom you shall come, and I will make all your enemies turn their backs to you.
zh: 我必在你面前展露我的威嚴；凡你所到的地方，我必使那裡的人民慌亂，又使你所有的仇敵都轉背而逃。

en: And I will send hornets before you, which shall drive out the Hivites, the Canaanites, and the Hittites from before you.
zh: 我必在你面前打發大黃蜂，把希未人、迦南人、赫人，都從你面前驅逐出去。

en: I will not drive them out from before you in one year, lest the land become desolate and the wild beasts multiply against you.
zh: 我不在一年之內把他們從你面前驅逐出去，恐怕這地變為荒涼，又恐怕田野間的走獸多起來害你。

en: Little by little I will drive them out from before you, until you have increased and possess the land.
zh: 我要漸漸地把他們從你面前驅逐出去，等到你的人數增多起來，承受那地為止。

en: And I will set your border from the Red Sea to the Sea of the Philistines, and from the wilderness to the Euphrates, for I will give the inhabitants of the land into your hand, and you shall drive them out before you.
zh: 我要限定你的境界，從紅海直到非利士海，從曠野直到大河。我要把那地的居民交在你手中，你要把他們從你面前驅逐出去。

en: You shall make no covenant with them and their gods.
zh: 不可與他們和他們的神立約。

en: They shall not dwell in your land, lest they make you sin against me; for if you serve their gods, it will surely be a snare to you."
zh: 不可讓他們住在你的境內，恐怕他們使你得罪我；如果你事奉他們的神，這必成為你的網羅。”
